description: Tafqit converts numeric amounts into written Arabic text, including currency-aware phrasing and bulk conversion. The site also explains how to use the service from applications and Excel.
summary: tafqit.com itself exposes a public web number-to-text tool and documentation pages, but its documented developer integration points route to a different domain (`api.tafkit.com` via RapidAPI), so there are no programmatic surfaces attributable to tafqit.com.
